subcodes.title: FAFINE
subcodes.first_line:
## FAFINE

E lavea mai ne Koe, O toku Atua, me e pefea a mea se ne fai ne Au mea faiite ko la ko fuli atu a olotou tua k
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH06201 — Opens 'Thou seest, O my God, how...Thy handmaidens'; different handmaidens prayer, not 'Magnified...reins of souls'. Correct tvl is pm_1018
